VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "GPT-4o System Card" is confirmed real, published on arXiv (2410.21276) in October 2024 by OpenAI with hundreds of authors. The cited author "Aleksander Mądry" appears in the real author list (shown as "Aleksander Mkadry" in some database renderings due to diacritic normalization), and the remaining cited authors substantially match the actual paper — this is a minor name formatting/encoding difference, not a fabrication.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.21276
